title: Modernizing Medicine - Specialty EHR Platform
problem: Dermatology and other specialty practices need EHR systems designed for their specific workflows, not generic primary care systems.
solution: AI-powered specialty EHR with dermatology-specific templates, image management, procedure documentation, and practice analytics.
technology: Cloud EHR, AI documentation assistance, specialty-specific workflows, image management
target_customer: Dermatology practices, orthopedic practices, ophthalmology, other specialties
ai_type: AI-powered documentation and clinical decision support
varden_fit: Moderate - Specialty EHR layer. Strong in dermatology specifically. Could be integration partner or model for specialty practice management.
notes: Leading specialty EHR, especially in dermatology. AI-powered documentation is interesting.
